description: State-child `effect=` attribute — single-target transition effect (§51.0.H Form 1). The .Closed state declares `effect=${ @opened = @opened + 1 }`; placed in the FROM state-child it fires when LEAVING .Closed. A click writes @door = Door.Open (a .Closed.rule=.Open-admitted transition); the effect runs once, @opened -> 1, engine -> Open.
rationale: §51.0.H Form 1: `effect=` on a single-target state-child runs when that transition fires; placed in the from state-child it is leave-semantics. Closed -> Open admitted by rule= -> the effect fires once -> @opened = 1.
